turns: Hi, I'd like to book a Tessera product demo for tomorrow.
The earliest time you have works for me. My name is Alex Kim and my email is alex.kim@acme.co.
Yes, please book it.
Can I schedule a demo for next Tuesday?
Let's take the earliest slot that day. I'm Dana Lopez, dana@brightloop.io.
That's correct, go ahead and book it.

description: Books a specific day and time
turns: I'd like to book a demo. What do you have on Monday?
10 AM is perfect. Name is Priya Nair, email priya@quanta.dev.
Yes, that's right.

description: Caller gives name + email + go-ahead early
turns: I'd like the next available demo slot, please.
My name is Sam Reyes, email sam@meridian.hk. Yes, book the first one for me.
Do you have anything Wednesday afternoon for a demo?
2 PM works great. I'm Noah Feld, noah@granite.de.
Confirmed, thanks.

description: Vague 'this week' but agrees to earliest
turns: I'd love to set up a Tessera demo sometime this week.
Whatever's earliest is fine. Grace Lin, grace@meridian.hk.
Yep, lock it in.

description: Vague 'soon', never commits to a day — must not book
turns: I want to book a demo sometime soon.
Hmm, let me check my calendar first and get back to you.

description: Non-committal about the day — must not guess a date
turns: Maybe next week could work for a demo?
I'm honestly not sure which day yet.

description: Friday is full; accepts the next open day
turns: Can I get a demo this Friday?
Oh, that's a shame. Then whatever the next open day is works. I'm Liam Byrne, liam@shamrock.ie.
Yes, book that one.

description: Asks for Friday, agrees to earliest after it
turns: I'd like to book a demo for Friday.
If Friday is full, the earliest slot after that is fine. Keiko Tanaka, keiko@sakura-labs.jp.
Please go ahead and book it.

description: Looks up a real confirmation code
turns: Can you look up my booking? The confirmation code is TFD-DEMO.

description: Looks up a code that doesn't exist
turns: Could you check the booking with code TFD-ZZ99 for me?

description: Off-topic question — polite redirect, no tools
turns: What's the weather like today?
Okay, never mind then.

description: Off-topic request — polite redirect, no tools
turns: Can you tell me a joke?

description: Starts booking then backs out — must not book
turns: I'd like to book a demo for Monday.
Actually, you know what, let me hold off for now. I'll book later.
